# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "2.1"
services:
  service-microservice-1:
    url: http://microservice-1.example.com
  service-microservice-2:
    url: http://microservice-2.example.com
routes:
  route-microservice-1:
    paths:
      - /api/v1/service1
    upstream:
      service: service-microservice-1
  route-microservice-2:
    paths:
      - /api/v1/service2
    upstream:
      service: service-microservice-2
plugins:
  global-plugins:
    rate-limiting:
      hour: 1000
  route-microservice-1:
    request-transformer:
      add-headers:
        X-Custom-Header: Value1
  route-microservice-2:
    response-transformer:
      remove-header: Cache-Control
